message: [ACCOUNT_ONBOARDING] 2026-03-20 11:42:40.264 SEVERE 2 ActivityContext Neither name nor overrideName were set! Did you forget to add ActivityContextDirective to directives? Or to set the name in the constructor?
note: Page redirected to account-onboarding wizard (535-326-0247) instead of ThemeGPT campaign view. Subsequent reload landed on account selector showing ThemeGPT 170-289-9815, Themegpt Manager 799-632-8615, and a 3rd account 310-040-5886 (Setup in progress).
